# Heart Disease Prediction using Logistic Regression

## Overview
A Machine Learning project to predict whether a person is at risk of heart disease based on medical attributes.

## Tech Stack
- Python
- Pandas
- Seaborn
- Scikit-learn
- Jupyter Notebook

## Work Done
- Loaded and explored the dataset
- Performed data inspection and preprocessing
- Separated features and target variable
- Split data into training and testing sets (80:20)
- Checked class balance in the target variable
- Built a Logistic Regression model
- Trained the model on the training data
- Evaluated model performance using classification metrics

## Model Used
- Logistic Regression

## Evaluation Metrics
- Accuracy Score
- Precision Score

## Results
- Accuracy: **88.52%**
- Precision: **87.88%**

## Conclusion
The Logistic Regression model achieved good performance in predicting heart disease, with an accuracy of 88.52% and precision of 87.88%.
